Business Report Parser 3.0 Pro
An automated, client-side data management tool designed to parse unstructured text-based field reports, extract financial metrics using regular expressions, provide an interactive verification interface, and seamlessly sync data to a centralized ledger database.
Key Features
 * *Intelligent Text Ingestion & Normalization*: Features a custom Unicode interceptor that normalizes stylized, bold, or italic mathematical alphanumeric characters (commonly generated by mobile keyboards or messaging apps) back to standard ASCII text before extraction.
 * *Robust RegEx Extraction Engine*: Uses advanced Regular Expressions to scan unformatted text blocks, bypassing layout variations and symbols (like *, /, or :) to isolate fields such as Market Name, Report Date and key financial metrics.
 * *Human-in-the-Loop Verification*: Automatically populates extracted values into a structured, interactive web form, allowing operators to visually audit and manually adjust figures before final submission.
 * *Automated Financial Calculators: Features browser-side computation engines that instantly calculate rolling metrics, including *Actual Collection, Total Cash Today, Outstanding Balances, and Next-Day Forecasting.
 * *Asynchronous Database Sync*: Bundles verified data into structured JSON payloads and transmits them instantly via an asynchronous POST API fetch directly to a centralized Google Sheets ledger via an Apps Script Web App bridge.
<strong>Tech Stack</strong>
 * *Frontend*: Semantic HTML5, Responsive CSS3
 * *Scripting Engine*: JavaScript (ES6+)
 * *Data Processing*: Regular Expressions (RegEx), String Normalization API
 * *Backend Database Integration*: Google Apps Script (Web App Endpoint), Google Sheets API
Sample Input & Workflow
 1. *Paste*: The user pastes a raw, unstructured text block copied from a messaging platform into the input box:
   text
   Market/Location*: Karmo Market
   Date: 21/05/2026
   Opening Cash: 0
   Supposed Collection: 29,760
   Total Deposits to Bank: 48,900
   Cost of Deals: 270,000
   
 2. *Extract*: The RegEx engines cleanly isolate text strings like "Karmo Market" and pull mathematical figures directly into the web form.
 3. *Verify & Sync*: The operator checks the calculated totals on the dashboard and hits calculate/sync to seamlessly log the entry into the primary tracking spreadsheet.
Live Demo
view the live website here: https://hybeet.github.io/Business-Report-Parser/
